metaDescription: Bot WhatsApp ah oo bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay su'aalaha ku saabsan Islaamka, ku salaysan in ka badan 165,000+ fatwo dhab ah oo la tixraacay. ChatGPT-gaaga gaarka ah ee Muslimka.

askDialogSubtitle: AI-geennu wuxuu ku salaysan yahay in ka badan 165,000 oo fatwo dhab ah. Haddii aan la helin mid la tixraaco, waxaa lagaa codsan doonaa inaad u gudbiso culimo dad ah. Wallaahu aclam (والله أعلم).
askPlaceholder: tusaale: Ma isku dari karaa salaadaha anigoo safar ku jira?
